extract: Soft-Boiled (Japanese: タマゴうみ Egg Lay), formatted as Softboiled prior to Pokémon X and Y, is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It was TM41 in Generation I. In Generation II and from Generation IV onwards, it is the signature move of Chansey and Blissey. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus, it is also the signature move of Happiny.
